message:
fix(tests): Use explicit type and try_from for loop index conversion

In scissor_edge_cases::test_deeply_nested_scissors, the loop variable
was being cast with `as i32` and `as u32`. Replace with:
- Explicit `0..50u32` loop range
- `i32::try_from(i).expect()` for safe conversion

This satisfies clippy::cast_possible_truncation and makes the
conversion bounds explicit in test code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
